stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the minimum Fuel required for the Commercial Air Transport flight with Jet aeroplanes, given the following information? Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Trip Fuel: 72 340 kg
Fuel to alternate: 4589 kg
Fuel flow at 1500 feet above destination aerodrome: 5592 kg per hour
Taxi Fuel: 345 kg
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
